description: Per-event log emitted by `iyashi.internal_phlebotomy` cell when a religious-corp iyashi clinic performs venipuncture in-house for a `mitate.diagnosticOrder` whose `orderRoutingTarget` is `iyashi-internal`. iyashi R2+ only. Per ADR-2605281950 §D3 + GE (phlebotomist MUST be vocation-flow L5 community-witnessed-competent steward — NO payroll / NO fee-for-service / NO contract-employment, inherits iyashi G14 + chigiri G13 + Liberation Ladder L5 from ADR-2605261000). Tube labels are encrypted (ADR-2605181100 envelope); cold-chain transit vendor must be in EXTERNAL_LOGISTICS_REGISTRY with Charter Rider §2(a)-(h) PASS attestation (ADR-2605281950 GB pattern).

phlebotomistClass.description: ADR-2605281950 GE structural enforcement: only this value is constitutionally valid. Clinical phlebotomist credential / state-licensed-phlebotomist / commercial-contract are NOT permitted classes (mirrors iyashi G3 community-witnessed-competent pattern at the phlebotomy level).

employmentRelation.description: ADR-2605281950 GE structural enforcement: only this value is constitutionally valid. payroll / wage / salary / bonus / commission / fee-for-service are NOT permitted (mirrors iyashi G14 + chigiri G13 + ADR-2605261000 L5).

lLevel.description: Liberation Ladder L5 Vocation tier (per ADR-2605261000).

clinicFacilityCid.description: Reference to the iyashi `com.etzhayyim.iyashi.clinicFacilityAttestation` for the site.

transitVendorDid.description: External courier DID; MUST be in EXTERNAL_LOGISTICS_REGISTRY with Charter Rider §2(a)-(h) PASS attestation chain (ADR-2605281950 GB pattern).

externalLabDid.description: Downstream lab DID; MUST match the originating `mitate.diagnosticOrder.externalLabDid` and be in EXTERNAL_LAB_DID_REGISTRY.

complicationFlag.description: TRUE if hematoma / vasovagal episode / failed-stick / other adverse event occurred during draw. Triggers iyashi `acute_first_line` cell escalation flow (iyashi R2+).

complicationNotesCid.description: Optional. If `complicationFlag = true`, link to encrypted notes envelope (ADR-2605181100).

volumeMlTenths.description: Specimen volume in mL × 10 (tenths of a milliliter). Implied units: 5 = 0.5 mL, 200 = 20.0 mL. Integer storage avoids floating-point drift per AT Protocol Lexicon spec discipline.

labelCidEnvelopeRef.description: Label payload is an `com.etzhayyim.encrypted.*` envelope (ADR-2605181100); plaintext PHI on tube label is prohibited.
